document_type.description: Type of document published in the Official Gazette.

ig.description: Internal IG identifier associated with the publication.

name.description: Name of the public authority or entity acting as contracting party.

cnpj.description: Brazilian corporate taxpayer identification number (CNPJ) of the contracting party in the format XX.XXX.XXX/XXXX-XX.

name.description: Name of the private or public entity contracted to provide goods or services.

cnpj.description: Brazilian corporate taxpayer identification number (CNPJ) of the contracted party in the format XX.XXX.XXX/XXXX-XX.

validity.description: Contract duration or validity period as stated in the document (e.g., number of months or specific term).

global_value.description: Total monetary value of the contract expressed in Brazilian currency.

local.description: City and state where the contract was signed.

date.description: Signature date in the format DD/MM/YYYY.

contracting_party.description: Name of the legal representative signing on behalf of the contracting party.

contracted_party.description: Name of the legal representative signing on behalf of the contracted party.

name.description: Name of the legal authority responsible for reviewing or endorsing the contract.

role.description: Official position held by the responsible legal authority.
